file.content:
---
name: rating_8l_credit_scale_2026
description: "8L Quality Rating 1-5 (credit-agency-style, Fitch/Moody/S&P analog) — design + (c)criteria + (a)validation; (b)code pending"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 305a69ff-3483-4f95-8f30-23845b96fb7d
---

8L upgrade ([REDACTED]02): rating cổ phiếu kiểu credit-agency (user idea). **MỘT TRỤC = độ bền / rủi ro mất vốn vĩnh viễn** (KHÔNG phải tín hiệu mua); định giá/timing là trục riêng (PB-floor [[cheap_pb_floor_quality_crisis_2026]] + Ngũ Hành). Buy-rule: bắt dislocation CHỈ ở rating ≤3.

**Thang 1–5** (1=cao nhất): 1 AAA/AA · 2 A · 3 BBB (sàn đầu tư thấp nhất) — **ranh giới IG/đầu cơ giữa 3 và 4 = ranh giới dip-cơ-hội vs dip-bẫy** — 4 BB (đầu cơ khả thi) · 5 B/CCC (tránh). Spec đầy đủ: workspace/`rating_8l_criteria.md`.

**3 nguyên tắc**: through-the-cycle (sàn `_Min5Y`, không chấm đỉnh chu kỳ); **STICKY** (không hạ bậc vì giá rơi → tránh pro-cyclicality của credit agency, đây là lý do tách 2 trục); red-flag gate cứng ép xuống 5.

**(c) CRITERIA per route** (router 4 nhánh: BANK ICB8355 / POWER ICB7535 / CYCLICAL commodity-map+sugar / COMPOUNDER):
- COMPOUNDER: red-flag gate (ROIC_Min5Y<0 / FSCORE≤3 / Debt_Eq_P0>3 / NP_TTM<0 → 5) + scorecard 7 trục (ROIC5Y, ROIC_Min5Y, ROE_Min5Y, Debt_Eq, cash-machine CFO/NP-TTM, FSCORE, **moat L4**) → bin.
- BANK: bank_lens_v3 gate — AVOID(NPL>3/cov<50/CAR<9/ROE<8)→5, WATCH(NPL>2/cov<80/NPL↑>0.5pp)→4, CLEAN→1-3 theo ROE/đệm. KHÔNG dùng Debt_Eq.
- POWER: debt-lifecycle — MATURE_YIELD→2, PRE-INFLECTION(nợ↓+CFO trả được)→3 (zone mua đáy), DEBT_STRESS→4-5.
- CYCLICAL: qua-đáy-survival — gate Debt_Eq>1.5 ở trough→5; **trần rating 2** (trừ low-cost-fortress net-cash NNC/DHA/HPG); ROIC_Min5Y.

**Quyết định CHỐT (user)**: cyclical trần 2 (trừ fortress); MATURE_YIELD power=2; KHÔNG outlook-notch giai đoạn đầu (rating thuần fundamental; Risk_Rating Beta/Dev để dành làm notch sau).

**(a) VALIDATION** (BQ, scorecard 6-trục bỏ moat vì không có lịch sử toàn universe, forward 12M LEAD252):
- Nhóm ĐÃ SỤT>20%: med12M & win & p10-downside ĐƠN ĐIỆU: R1 +12.9%/67%/p10−23% · R2 +13.1%/67%/−26 · R3 +9.2%/61%/−34 · R4 +5.0%/55%/−45 · R5 +1.8%/51%/−44. **Ranh giới 3/4 tách dip-cơ-hội (≤3: +9-13%/61-67%) vs dip-bẫy (≥4: +1.8-5%/51-55%) — ĐÚNG thiết kế.** Downside p10 đơn điệu = credit-rating semantic (bậc cao bảo vệ vốn worst-case).
- Nhóm không sụt cũng đơn điệu (R1 +12.8% → R5 +3.1%).
- ⚠️ R1≈R2 hòa median (+12.9 vs 13.1) vì **bỏ moat**; production thêm moat(L4) sẽ tách. Bin cutoff (≥10→1,7-9→2,4-6→3,2-3→4,<2→5; max 12 khi bỏ moat) đơn điệu tốt, giữ.
- BANK/POWER/CYCLICAL dùng gate đã validate riêng (NT2 power 2Y+53%, bank gate, cyclical through-cycle [[cyclical_commodity_framework_2026]]).

**(b) DONE (CSV-only, chưa cắm pipeline) — `rating_8l.py`** → `data/rating_8l.csv` (777 mã). Engine sector-aware. Bugs đã sửa qua review user: (1) GPM_P0/ROE5Y là PHÂN SỐ không phải % (moat ngưỡng 0.25/0.15); (2) FSCORE BỎ khỏi red-flag gate (junk nhầm FPT/GAS/DGC — FSCORE volatile). **Feedback user [REDACTED]02 đã áp**: (1) BANK chấm ASSET-QUALITY-led (NPL+coverage trước ROE) → VCB=1 (NPL0.6%/cov253%); thị trường trọng chất lượng tài sản. (2) **ROE_Trailing thay ROE_Min5Y làm SCORER** (ROE_Min5Y quá xa/cũ vd MWG min0.7% vs trailing25%); ROE_Min5Y giờ chỉ là GATE (<0→cap rating4). (3) REE→COMPOUNDER (holding đa ngành, ICB7535 nhưng không phải power thuần; HOLDING_OVERRIDE set). Ratings hợp lý: VNM/FPT/VCS/PNJ/DHC/BMP/SAB=1, GAS/PVT/VHC/HPG/DGC/DRI/QTP/NT2/MBB/ACB=2, MWG/REE/PHR/GVR=3.

**FSCORE-replacement research (điểm 5 user)**: FSCORE phân biệt theo cường-độ-tài-sản (proxy GPM-median). KẾT QUẢ: FSCORE đơn điệu CẢ 2 nhóm nhưng (a) ASSET-HEAVY (GPM<20, công nghiệp nặng) = đất diễn: spread +7.1pp, bucket đáy về ~0% (nhận diện hàng xấu) — GIỮ FSCORE ở đây; (b) ASSET-LIGHT (GPM≥30, dịch vụ/tech): sàn cao (kể cả FSCORE≤3 vẫn +6.7%), FSCORE phân biệt kém hữu ích; CFO/NP bị đảo; **ROIC5Y NON-monotonic (≥20% chỉ +7.5% < mid 10-15% +12.4% — bị định giá đắt nén return)**. → KHÔNG single-metric nào thắng rõ ở asset-light. ĐỀ XUẤT: quality-axis SECTOR-CONDITIONAL — FSCORE cho asset-heavy; asset-light dùng composite ROIC-durability + revenue-growth-consistency + cash-conversion (scorecard đã có phần lớn), down-weight FSCORE. ROIC inverts-with-return = bằng chứng nữa cho 2-trục (rating=chất lượng KHÔNG dự báo return). TODO: build+validate asset-light composite (cần pull Revenue_YoY history).

**REALESTATE route thêm ([REDACTED]02, feedback KCN)**: user phát hiện KCN trong 8L top-30 bị rating 5 = mâu thuẫn ranking. Nguyên nhân: COMPOUNDER red-flag D/E>3 (tiền thuê đất trả trước=nợ ảo → SIP/NTC D/E~3.8 bị junk dù ROE 23-25%) + CFO-âm (năm gom đất, vd KBC cfo_np−8.4). FIX: route **REALESTATE = ICB 8633** (L8 asset-play), bỏ red-flag D/E & CFO & ROIC_min, chấm ROE_Trailing+ROIC+leverage-lenient+cash-light, **cap 2 / FLOOR 4** (đất bảo chứng → không xuống 5 trừ khi lỗ TTM thật). Kết quả: SIP/IDC/VHM/D2D/NTC/SZL/LHG/TIP=2, DXG/SZC/DIG=3, KBC/BCM/PDR/NLG/NVL/VIC=4, chỉ developer lỗ-TTM (AAV/API/HTN/IDJ/PV2/VPH/VRC)=5. Dist RE: 13/28/30/7. **User CHỐT: giữ rating như hiện tại, KHÔNG làm asset-light FSCORE-composite (over-engineer)**. Coverage = toàn bộ ticker_1m 777 mã, universe-independent (mọi cổ phiếu giao dịch đều có rating).

**🔑 LEVERAGE FIX QUAN TRỌNG ([REDACTED]02)**: phát hiện qua review BĐS — `Debt_Eq_P0` trong BQ = **TỔNG NỢ PHẢI TRẢ/vốn** (đếm cả "người mua trả tiền trước" + phải trả người bán + deferred-rev), KHÔNG phải nợ vay. Bằng chứng: NTC total-liab/eq 3.82 vs **nợ vay thật 0.03**; HHS/TCH StDebt=LtDebt=0 nhưng Debt_Eq 0.43/0.52. → phạt oan toàn bộ asset-play/RE/KCN. FIX: dùng **`STLTDebt_Eq_P0` (nợ vay ST+LT/vốn)** cho MỌI route (real_lev() helper, fallback Debt_Eq nếu null). Đúng đắn toàn hệ (rủi ro tài chính = nợ vay, không phải vốn khách trả trước). COMPOUNDER bucket-5 321→287. HHS fix: ICB 3353 (xe tải, đã pivot BĐS Hoàng Huy) → REALESTATE_OVERRIDE={"HHS"}; HHS có 1 quý lỗ NP_P1−38.5tỷ sau spike +3507tỷ = lumpy RE recognition (ROIC_Min5Y chạm âm). RE thêm tín hiệu **pipeline = UnearnRev_P0/totalAsset ≥0.15 → +1** (người mua trả tiền trước = doanh thu tương lai đã bán; SIP 47%/NTC 74% hưởng lợi). Cột RE_Inventory rỗng (bỏ). Kết quả RE: HHS/TCH/PDR=3, SIP/NTC/VHM=2, BCM/KBC/NLG=4 (nợ vay thật cao/CFO âm).

**Moat ENHANCED ([REDACTED]02, user muốn weight cao hơn)**: moat_tag giờ = GPM-LEVEL(≥0.25) + GPM-STABILITY(CV≤0.20 qua 8 quý GPM_P0..P7 = pricing power) + ROE5Y(≥0.15). STRONG=cả 3; MODERATE+/MODERATE/WEAK. **Weight cao hơn: STRONG moat upgrade 3→2 VÀ 2→1** (trước chỉ 2→1). Dist COMPOUNDER: STRONG66/MOD+80/MOD32/WEAK435; bucket-1 54→64. Hạn chế: GPM-moat bỏ sót brand-moat biên thấp (PNJ/bán lẻ) → bù bằng thành phần ROE (PNJ=MOD+).

**3Y-WINDOW FIX ([REDACTED]02, user)**: hard 5Y-min junked COVID-hit monopolies — ACV/SAS ROIC_Min5Y<0 (2020-21 không bay) nhưng monopoly biên 59-65%. Bằng chứng ACV ROIC_Min5Y −0.03 → ROIC_Min3Y **+0.133**; SAS −0.025 → +0.112. FIX: chuyển TẤT CẢ floor cứng **5Y→3Y** (ROIC3Y, ROIC_Min3Y, ROE_Min3Y) mọi route — 3Y (2023-25) loại COVID, responsive hơn, "tránh sự kiện đặc biệt" (user directive). Kết quả: cụm CẢNG/dịch vụ sân bay ACV/SAS/SCS/AST/NCT (monopoly) → **rating 1**; HÃNG BAY HVN/VJC vẫn 5 (biên mỏng/thâm dụng vốn/ROIC_min3Y vẫn âm — phân biệt cảng-vs-hãng-bay ĐÚNG bản chất). COMPOUNDER bucket-5 287→263, bucket-1 64→69. Limit: 3Y xử COVID giờ; shock tương lai trong 3Y cần EVENTS-overlay (đã có cho DGC ở unified_screener) port sang.

**RED-FLAG MINIMIZED ([REDACTED]02, user "hạn chế red-flag, để scorecard tự làm việc")**: PVS rating 5 dù NP cả năm +1934tỷ (4 quý gần đều dương) chỉ vì ROIC_Min3Y −0.016 (1 quý cũ chớm âm). Nguyên tắc: 1 quý âm KHÔNG được junk nếu **báo cáo NĂM vẫn dương** (vd HPG 2022). FIX: **BỎ red-flag ROIC_Min3Y<0 hoàn toàn** (artifact của quarterly-min; ROIC yếu vẫn mất điểm scorecard=0, không cần cliff) + **bỏ loss-gate ROE_Min3Y<0**. Red-flag COMPOUNDER giờ CHỈ còn: **NP_TTM<0 (lỗ cả năm)** + debt/eq>3 (real-debt, hiếm). (event-smoothing/transient_event trước đó BỎ — không cần nữa.) **Hiệu ứng: COMPOUNDER bucket-5 SỤP 243→142**, redistribute vào 3 (178) & 4 (155); red-flag chỉ fire 65/604 (~11%). Nhóm 5 giờ = lỗ-cả-năm/đòn-bẩy-cực-đoan/scorecard-đáy, không junk oan. PVS 5→4, scorecard tự quyết.

**INSURANCE route ([REDACTED]02, user)**: cả ngành bảo hiểm bị rating 5 vì ROIC3Y ÂM TOÀN BỘ (PVI −0.089, BVH −0.268, ABI −0.371) → red-flag. ROIC/GPM/FSCORE/Debt_Eq VÔ NGHĨA với bảo hiểm (vốn=danh mục đầu tư+float; dự phòng nghiệp vụ=nợ vận hành như tiền gửi bank; thiên tai/tai nạn spike rồi phục hồi). FIX: route **INSURANCE = ICB 8530-8579** (853x nonlife + 857x life), chấm theo ROE_Trailing + ROE3Y (avg tự smooth năm cat): 1=ROE_tr≥15%&ROE3Y≥12%, 2=≥11%&≥9%, 3=≥7%, 4=≥0, 5=lỗ. Kết quả: **PVI/PRE/ABI=1** (top property insurer, ROE 15%+), MIG/BIC/BVH/VNR=2, PTI/BMI=3, BLI/BHI=4, KHÔNG ai =5. Engine giờ **6 routes**: COMPOUNDER/BANK/POWER/CYCLICAL/REALESTATE/INSURANCE.

**SECURITIES route ([REDACTED]02, user — MBS=5)**: chứng khoán (ICB 877x) bị 5 vì scorecard công nghiệp không hợp: ROIC ~7-8% thấp (0đ), ROE_Trailing thường NULL (0đ), đòn bẩy 2.03 từ margin-funding bị phạt (0đ), FSCORE/CFO méo → score~1→bin5. NHƯNG ROE khỏe ổn định (MBS ROE3Y 13.3%/5Y 14.7%). Không phải red-flag — là scorecard sai ngành (giống insurance/bank). FIX: route **SECURITIES = ICB 8770-8779**, chấm ROE (ROE_Trailing fallback ROE3Y), **cap 2** (cyclical theo turnover thị trường): 2=ROE≥13%&ROE3Y≥11%, 3=≥9%&≥7%, 4=≥5%, 5=lỗ/trough. Kết quả: MBS/SSI/VIX/CTS→2, VND/SHS/HCM/FTS/BSI→3, yếu→4-5. **Engine giờ 7 routes**.

**BANK gate softened + "profitable→4" floor ([REDACTED]02, user)**: (1) Bank AVOID cliff (NPL>3%/cov<50%/CAR<9%/ROE<8% → 5) junked VPB oan (NPL 3.6% nhưng ROE 15.5%/CAR 14.3%) — thị trường giữ giá VPB tốt. FIX rate_bank: **ROE là base, asset-quality là DIFFERENTIATOR (lên 1-2) KHÔNG phải kill-switch**; chỉ ROE<8% → 5. Bỏ dùng cột 'gate'. Kết quả: VCB/CTG→1, MBB/TCB/ACB→2, VPB/HDB/OCB/BID/TPB/MSB/VIB→3, chỉ SSB/EIB/STB (ROE<8%)→5. (2) **CTD (xây dựng ICB 2357) rating 5 do scorecard** (GPM 4%, ROIC 2.5%, cfo_np −1.42) dù NP+843tỷ/net-cash/hồi phục. Nguyên tắc: **rating 5 = IMPAIRED (lỗ cả năm/đòn bẩy cực đoan = red-flag branch); có lãi cả năm dù mỏng = tệ nhất ĐẦU CƠ (4), không phải distress (5)**. COMPOUNDER else-branch: rating==5→4 "profitable→4". CTD/FCN/C4G→4. COMPOUNDER bucket-5 125→58 (chỉ còn lỗ/over-lev), bucket-4 →208.

**TRIẾT LÝ (user hỏi: thị trường hay hệ thống đánh giá rủi ro)**: rating = rủi ro NỀN TẢNG/through-cycle (mất vốn vĩnh viễn), CỐ Ý độc lập với giá. Giá trị của nó = nói điều giá KHÔNG nói; nếu bám giá thì chỉ là momentum, vô dụng. Hai-trục: rating (rủi ro của ta) × valuation/PB-floor (việc của thị trường) — BỔ SUNG, không cạnh tranh. NHƯNG rating phải đọc nền tảng TRUNG THỰC: CTD/VPB=5 là SAI nền tảng (gate cứng đọc nhầm — chúng có lãi+vốn mạnh = rủi ro thấp), sửa gate để đo đúng, KHÔNG phải để đuổi theo giá. Khi rating-trung-thực ≠ thị trường → chính divergence đó là tín hiệu (market mê rating-4 = momentum/đắt? bỏ quên rating-1 = cơ hội rẻ = PB-floor).

**TOP-30 RANKING + STABILITY factor ([REDACTED]02, user)**: rating_8l.py giờ xuất top-30 đầu-tư-được (rating≤3 & liq≥3tỷ) → data/rating_8l_top30.csv. Rank = (3−rating)*100 + qual_adj; qual = core_score (non-fin) / ROE*60 cap12 (fin); **qual_adj = qual × stability**. `stability()` 0.4-1.0 (user: ổn định MỚI là moat, không phải mức ROE đỉnh): phạt (a) GPM-CV cao (chỉ non-financial — GPM vô nghĩa với tài chính) (b) ROE_Trailing>>ROE3Y = đỉnh chu kỳ (ratio>1.3→0.75, >1.8→0.5). Kết quả: VIX/CTS (broker ROE đỉnh) lùi #22/#29, VVS (ROE74% bất thường) #18, KSV/HAH (cyclical) lùi; banks ổn định MBB/ACB/TCB dẫn rating-2; PVI #10 (insurance ổn định, không bị phạt GPM). Top: CTG/PNJ/SAB/BMP/NTP/VNM/ACV/TLG/VCB/PVI/FPT/SCS.

**PB-FLOOR overlay = 2-trục hợp nhất ([REDACTED]02, user)**: rating_8l.py thêm val_state (PB_z vs sử chính nó: ≤−1=DISLOCATED buy-zone, −1..−0.3=below-avg, ≤0.6=fair, >0.6=rich) + xuất **data/rating_8l_buynow.csv** = rating≤3 ∩ PB_z≤−0.3 ∩ liq≥3tỷ. "Cheap" cho quality = PB_z (rẻ vs lịch sử) KHÔNG phải PB<1 tuyệt đối (quality hiếm khi<1). Live [REDACTED]01: CREAM (rating1+DISLOCATED) = VGC(z−1.37)/SCS(z−1.07)/ACV(z−1.05) — monopoly top-quality đang ở vùng rẻ-vs-sử = golden-cell. DGC rating2 z−1.82/−44% nhưng EVENT risk (chủ tịch bắt). Phần lớn top-30 "rich" (thị trường cao) → buy-now là tập hẹp quý. x-ref [[cheap_pb_floor_quality_crisis_2026]].

**PB_z-TRAP guard — DUAL WINDOW ([REDACTED]02, user)**: user phát hiện HAG ở DISLOCATED là BẪY THỐNG KÊ — HAG mất vốn (ROE_Min5Y −7.5%) → book bào mòn → PB_MA5Y 1.66 (đầu cơ/distress quá khứ) → PB_z−1.1 là ẢO, "ít đắt hơn quá khứ" KHÔNG phải rẻ thật. NGUYÊN TẮC LỘ RA: cần **2 cửa sổ**: (a) **3Y** cho rating chất-lượng-hiện-tại (tránh sốc cũ COVID); (b) **5Y** cho độ-tin-cậy-PB_z (book integrity — bắt mất vốn lịch sử). HAG: ROE_Min3Y +13% (rating qua) nhưng ROE_Min5Y −7.5% (book hỏng). GUARD: val_state="0_PBz-TRAP" nếu pb_z≤−0.3 & ROE_Min5Y<0; buy-now loại ROE_Min5Y<0. Dùng **ROE_Min5Y KHÔNG phải ROIC_Min5Y** (ACV ROIC_Min5Y âm do COVID nhưng ROE_Min5Y +1.4% dương=không mất vốn → giữ đúng). Loại HAG/NRC; cream VGC/SCS/ACV/VNM giữ. Bài học: thận trọng với thống kê naive — z-score vô nghĩa khi mẫu số (book) không đáng tin.

**BACKTEST 2-trục ([REDACTED]02, (c) đã làm)**: ticker 2014+, fwd-12M LEAD252. Pooled med12M/win/p25: baseline 5.9/57/−14.2 · QUAL-only(ROIC3Y≥.10&ROE_Min3Y≥.05) 9.5/63/−8.6 · DIS-only(pbz≤−1) 14.3/65/−7.6 · **DIS-TRAP(ROE_Min5Y<0) 8.8/58/−12.5** · DIS+book-guard 15.9/67/−5.6 · **COMBINED(QUAL+DIS+book) 18.6/70.5/−3.7**. KẾT LUẬN: (1) kết hợp 2-trục THẮNG từng trục riêng mọi chiều (return+win+downside); (2) **book-guard validated bằng số liệu** — capital-destroyer dislocation chỉ 8.8% (≈baseline) vs guarded 15.9% → bẫy HAG thật, kéo tụt tín hiệu; (3) downside đơn điệu tốt dần. **By-year: contrarian** — thắng mạnh năm gấu/hồi phục (2022 +8.2 vs mkt−10.3, 2023 +17 vs 8) NHƯNG thua bull momentum cực mạnh (2017 −41 vs +2 n=210, lag 2020 V-recovery). Drawdown-filter KHÔNG cải thiện sạch (mixed) → không thêm. Bản chất = tín hiệu "mua sợ hãi", lag melt-up euphoric = đánh đổi chấp nhận được (đúng triết lý). Deploy-worthy; nên pair Ngũ Hành để né deploy trong bull cực mạnh.

**🔑 DT5G TABLE CONVENTION (user-confirmed [REDACTED]02: MỌI quyết định dùng DT5G làm nền)**: DT5G = **`tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live`** (published bởi deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/publish_gated_state.py LAYER1, có macro-healthcheck fail-safe→DT4; đọc bởi golive_recommend.py DT_TABLE, crisis_release, fa_postcrisis_bear, fa_longterm_sleeve, fa_horizon_state_ic). **CANONICAL `vnindex_5state` = LEGACY (Tinh Tế/v2g_pe3c/v3.4b lineage), KHÁC DT5G 35% lịch sử — CHỈ research/backtest/compare cũ đọc, KHÔNG phải đường live.** RULE: mọi consumer LIVE/mới phải đọc `_dt5g_live`, KHÔNG đọc canonical mộc. **FIXED: cheap_pb_floor.py Ngũ Hành-gate đổi `vnindex_5state`→`vnindex_5state_dt5g_live`** (đã align). States 1-5 = CRISIS/BEAR/NEUTRAL/BULL/EX-BULL; hiện NEUTRAL(3). **SYNC DONE [REDACTED]02 (user approved)**: canonical `vnindex_5state` 2014+ giờ = DT5G **100% match** (pre-2014 GIỮ từ archive, không mất data; range 2000→2026 6290 rows). Bản cũ → `vnindex_5state_archive_pre_dt5g_20260602`. **⚠️ ONE-TIME — sync sẽ bị REVERT nếu deploy_v2g_pe3c_s3.py/deploy_ngu_hanh.py (ghi series cũ vào canonical) chạy lại.** Để bền: hoặc cho publish_gated_state.py mirror DT5G→canonical mỗi ngày (file trong package deploy_golive_dt5g_v4 ship cho dev, cần approve sửa), hoặc ngừng các deploy series-cũ. cheap_pb_floor đọc dt5g_live trực tiếp nên không phụ thuộc canonical.

**DAILY REPORT EDITS ([REDACTED]02, user)**: telegram_recommend.py (18:00 report) sửa: (1) header "BA-SYSTEM v11 LIVE"→**"🛰️ V4 12.1 (DT5G) REPORT"**; (2) strategy line→V4 12.1 (BAL+Ensemble VN30/LAGGED+BASE parking); (3) **thêm cột R (8L rating 1-5)** vào book table (RATING_MAP đọc rating_8l.csv); (4) **BỎ F-system overlay** (cả 2 nhánh); (5) cash-msg "BA-system"→"V4 12.1"; (6) section ③ MARKET-STATE bỏ dòng "State:" (đã có ở header regime), giữ As-of+Source; (7) dòng NAV V4 12.1 ghi rõ "**chạy từ {start}**"; Book B đổi nhãn "Ensemble leg VN30/LAGGED". **8L task `8L_Daily_Alert` đổi 15:30→17:45** (qua PowerShell Set-ScheduledTask; schtasks /change treo vì hỏi password) — chạy trước report 18:00 để rating fresh. **✅ GOLIVE WIRED ([REDACTED]02): report giờ hiển thị PICKS V4 12.1 THẬT.** (1) golive_recommend.py ghi cả LAGGED entries vào CSV (trước chỉ MD); (2) papertrade_daily.bat thêm bước [0e] golive_recommend (sinh out/golive_recommendations_<date>.csv lúc 15:30 sau publish DT5G); (3) telegram_recommend.main() đọc golive CSV của ngày → lấy ticker list (BAL + leg active VN30/LAGGED), hiển thị bằng df_liq (Close/score/FA/RSI/**R rating**); Book B nhãn động theo mode; FALLBACK BA-core nếu CSV thiếu (report không vỡ). Kiến trúc: golive=picks, report=display+rating. Verified dry-run [REDACTED]02: BAL=KSF(R2), Book B trống (no 2nd-leg today).

**(A) SLEEVE vs v11/v12.1 — VALIDATED signal-level ([REDACTED]02, analyze_rating_sleeve.py)**: rating×PB-floor sleeve = basket EW tháng của COMBINED (ROIC3Y≥.10&ROE_Min3Y≥.05 & pbz≤−1 & ROE_Min5Y≥0), ~16 mã khi active, 141/150 tháng có tín hiệu. **Corr với v11 −0.09, v12.1 −0.04, VNI −0.11** (uncorrelated; v11-v12.1 +0.93). Standalone 16.5%/DD−30.6%/Calmar0.54. **BLEND**: v12.1+20%sleeve = CAGR 20.1%(≈)/MaxDD −17→**−14.9%**/Calmar 1.19→**1.35**/Sharpe→**1.40**; v11+20% Calmar 0.90→1.02. Sweet spot 15-20%. **Smoking gun: 2022 sleeve +20.4% vs v11 +1.5% (VNI −32.8%); 2024 +21.5% vs ~+10%**. KHÁC FA-overlay fail: luồng return RIÊNG uncorrelated (cộng), không overlay sửa pick (trừ winner). **TODO: prod-spec validation (TC/liq/capacity) trước deploy sleeve.**

**⏰ TODO THỨ BẢY (~[REDACTED]06/07) — user nhờ nhắc chạy (B)&(C)**: (B) distress-exclusion = chỉ loại rating-5 khỏi pick v11/v12.1, test cắt tail-risk không giết winner. (C) regime-conditional sizing = rating điều tiết size CHỈ trong BEAR/CRISIS (Ngũ Hành≤2). Cả 2 backtest prod-spec.

**DEPLOYED (a)+(b) [REDACTED]02**: (a) unified_screener.py merge cột `rating` từ rating_8l.csv (hiện cột R trong .md/.csv); cheap_pb_floor.py REFACTOR = đọc rating_8l.csv, gate **rating≤3 + book-guard(ROE_Min5Y≥0) + PB_z**, tier GOLDEN(R1+z≤−1)/STRONG(R2)/SPEC(R3)/ACCUM(R1-2+z−1..−0.3)/TRAP(excl). (b) **Ngũ Hành gating**: đọc tav2_bq.vnindex_5state (1=CRISIS..5=EX-BULL; hiện NEUTRAL=3); state≥4 euphoric→cảnh báo "contrarian lags cf 2017, size nhỏ"; state≤2 stress→"cửa sổ mua tốt nhất". Telegram alert NEW vào GOLDEN/STRONG (telegram OK). **pt_8l_daily.bat 5 bước: rating_8l→unified_screener→rank_8l→rank_8l_daily_alert→cheap_pb_floor** (rating_8l PHẢI chạy đầu). Live: GOLDEN VGC/SCS/ACV, STRONG DGC/BWE, TRAP loại HAG/NRC. Pipeline: ...→rating_8l→unified_screener→rank_8l→dna_card. x-ref [[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]], [[cheap_pb_floor_quality_crisis_2026]].

**5F ↔ 8L moat bridge + interactive bot report (built [REDACTED]03).** Connects the qualitative
**5F** persona (Porter 5-Forces, `5F.md`, a claude.ai project — assesses industry structure + firm
moat) into the quantitative **8L** ranker. See [[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]] (FA-as-ranker FAILS full-NAV).

**Core decision — moat = GATE/durability multiplier, NOT additive points.** 8L's L4 was only an ROE
proxy, fooled by cyclical high-ROE (DGC ROE 37% looks "STRONG" but 5F reads NARROW cost-position; DRC
no-moat→transient). User insight: *moat is rare + stable over years* → so the tag file is a small,
hand-maintained, ~annual-review **registry**, and look-ahead risk is minimal (a stable structural fact,
not a trading signal). Overlay is intentionally ASYMMETRIC: NONE = big haircut (−16 on a high-ROE+deep-dd
block: L4→3 + buy-fear ×−0.5), WIDE = small bonus (+1.2: L4 floored 12, dislocation ×+0.15, capped at
ceiling 15), NARROW/untagged = no-op. Mainly removes false-positives, doesn't mint points.

**Files built:**
- `moat_5f.py` — schema + `load_moat_tags()` + `apply_moat_overlay()` (knobs at top: WIDE_FLOOR 12,
  NONE_CAP 3, factors +0.15/−0.50). Bounded, backward-compatible (no file → no-op).
- `data/moat_tags.csv` — the registry (cols: ticker,moat_tier WIDE/NARROW/NONE,moat_type,entry,risk1,asof,src).
  Hand-edit (NO intake script — over-engineering for a tiny stable table). Seeded VCS=WIDE, DGC/QTP/NNC=NARROW,
  DRC=NONE from validated 8L_README verdicts. `risk1` = kill-condition to watch (when the stable moat changes).
- `rank_8l.py` — imports overlay, applies in score_row, shows `5F` column. LIVE-ONLY: never wire into
  prodspec backtester (post-hoc/non-point-in-time → look-ahead).
- `dna_card.py` — added `5F-Moat:` line (tier + type + risk1) to bank & compounder branches + CSV cols.

**Interactive Telegram bot — ALREADY EXISTED, do NOT rebuild.** `telegram_8l_bot.py` long-polls
getUpdates, user texts a ticker → `reply_for()`. Upgraded only the renderer via new `dna_report.py`
`build_report(tk)`. **Two-clocks layout** (user's framing): 🧬 DNA (slow/structural — route·engine·
moat+5F+risk1·TAM·margin, from CACHED unified_screener/dna_cards/moat_tags) + ⚡ NOW (live BQ AT QUERY
TIME — price·%chg·pe_z/pb_z·dd·liq·**regime**·rank). Only NOW pays live-query cost; DNA cached (correct,
changes per quarter). Each block stamped with own freshness. Ngũ-Hành regime from `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state`
(state **1=CRISIS 2=BEAR 3=NEUTRAL 4=BULL 5=EX-BULL**, weights 0/20/70/100/130%, cached 5min). Quick-read =
gate-style synthesis (regime+dislocation+moat tier), explicitly "not a buy signal".

**Bug fixed:** live_now join needed `lt.ticker=t.ticker` (was joining all tickers same date → wrong row);
nan-guard via `_s()` for bank cards (no moat_type/tam/margin).
**Coverage gap (CLOSED):** `dna_card.py` no-arg now profiles the FULL universe from unified_screener.csv
(`_universe()`, fallback to curated list) → `dna_cards.csv` = 129 rows. Added as step [4/6] in
`pt_8l_daily.bat` (after rank_8l, before alerts) so DNA cards refresh nightly. Bot needs restart to load
new code (dna_report import).

lastPrompt: tôi đang muốn hỏi là khi chúng ta research qua model 8L, quá trình đó có điều gì giúp chúng ta có thể cải thiện model rating fa của chúng ta hiện nay đang sử dụng cho các chiến lược paper-trading hiện…

aiTitle: Improve rating model using 8L research findings

content.text:
Câu hỏi rất hay — và may mắn là toàn bộ research stream qua 8L đã trả lời nó khá rõ ràng. Dưới đây là tổng hợp những gì rút ra được, sắp theo "dùng được ngay → cần validate → đừng làm".

## Bối cảnh: hai model FA, và bài học trung tâm

Hiện có **hai** thứ tên "FA":
- **FA tier A–E** (`fundamental_rating.py`) = layer L4 đang chạy trong paper-trade (V11/V12.1). Vai trò thực tế: **gate + router**, KHÔNG phải ranker — BA-core đòi `fa_tier∈{C,D}` (FA dùng *ngược*: momentum trên hàng không-hoàn-hảo) + loại tier E (AVOID).
- **8L rating 1–5** (`rating_8l.py`, credit-style) = sản phẩm research mới, sector-aware, 2-trục (chất lượng × PB-floor).

**Bài học lớn nhất, lặp đi lặp lại và đã được integrated-test:** *làm cho ranker "đánh giá công ty giỏi hơn" KHÔNG cải thiện được paper-trade book.* Bằng chứng (full-NAV prod-spec, không phải signal-level):
- EW5 (bỏ health+valuation): signal +2.7pp nhưng **full-NAV −0.27pp** ❌
- Bank sub-model vào BA-core: standalone IC thắng nhưng **−3.1pp** ❌
- redflag≥3 exclusion: **−0.7pp** (loại nhầm winner) ❌

Lý do: book bị **capacity-bound** (12 slot), FA dùng *ngược*, và momentum book **kháng** mọi overlay FA. → Cải tiến KHÔNG đến từ ranker tốt hơn. Nó đến từ 3 hướng khác:

## Nhóm A — Sửa đúng cái GATE (port được gần như ngay, rủi ro thấp)

Đây là chỗ FA thực sự làm việc (E-exclusion + router), nên sửa cho *đúng* là hợp lệ — khác với sửa ranker.

1. **Routing theo ngành cho E-exclusion.** Scorecard công nghiệp generic **đánh sai cả ngành**: bank (IC OOS −0.045, *gây hiểu lầm*), insurance (ROIC luôn âm → cả ngành bị junk oan), securities (MBS→5 oan), real-estate (Debt_Eq giả từ tiền khách trả trước). 8L đã có engine **7 route** xử đúng. → Thay tier-E generic bằng exclusion sector-aware để book ngừng loại/giữ sai bank/insurance/securities/RE.

2. **Bug đòn bẩy `Debt_Eq_P0` → `STLTDebt_Eq_P0`.** Phát hiện quan trọng: `Debt_Eq_P0` trong BQ = *tổng nợ phải trả/vốn* (gồm tiền khách trả trước, deferred-rev), KHÔNG phải nợ vay (NTC: 3.82 vs nợ vay thật 0.03). Nếu FA layer dùng nó ở axis health/red-flag → phạt oan asset-play/RE/tiện ích. Đây là **sửa data thuần**, port thẳng.

3. **Floor 5Y → 3Y.** Hard `_Min5Y` junk các monopoly dính COVID (ACV/SAS ROIC_Min5Y<0 vì 2020-21). Chuyển floor chất lượng về 3Y → "tránh sự kiện đặc biệt", responsive hơn.

## Nhóm B — Thêm một LUỒNG RETURN mới (đây mới là alpha thật)

Đây là điểm quan trọng nhất. 8L cải thiện paper-trade KHÔNG bằng cách sửa gate bên trong momentum book, mà bằng cách **thêm sleeve uncorrelated**:

- **Sleeve rating × PB-floor (COMBINED)**: corr với v11 **−0.09**, v12.1 **−0.04**, VNI −0.11 → luồng return *riêng*, cộng vào chứ không overlay sửa pick (đó là lý do nó không bị "momentum-resists-FA").
- Blend 15–20% vào v12.1: Calmar 1.19→**1.35**, Sharpe →**1.40**, MaxDD −17→**−14.9%**, CAGR ≈ giữ. Smoking gun: 2022 sleeve **+20.4%** vs v11 +1.5% (VNI −32.8%).
- Khớp với phát hiện horizon×state: FA IC tăng theo horizon (3M +0.06 → **2Y +0.11**), mạnh nhất ở **BEAR** (accumulate quality), ≈0 ở BULL. Momentum book trade ở BULL/EX-BULL nên FA vô dụng *ở đó* — đúng chỗ FA giỏi là long-horizon/bear, tức là một sleeve riêng.

⚠️ **Còn nợ prod-spec validation** (TC/liq/capacity) trước khi deploy sleeve.

## Nhóm C — Hai test sạch nhất (đúng là TODO Thứ Bảy ~06-07/06, đang đến gần)

Hai cách *trực tiếp* nhất kiểm tra 8L rating có giúp book hiện tại không, cả hai backtest prod-spec:
- **(B) Distress-exclusion**: chỉ loại **rating-5** khỏi pick v11/v12.1 — cắt tail-risk mà không giết winner. (Lưu ý: redflag-exclusion từng fail vì cắt winner; rating-5 là gate ngành-đúng nên có thể khác.)
- **(C) Regime-conditional sizing**: rating điều tiết *size* CHỈ trong BEAR/CRISIS (Ngũ Hành ≤2) — đúng với "FA mạnh nhất ở bear, ≈0 ở bull".

## Đừng làm (đã bị bác bỏ thực nghiệm)

- Đừng cố làm ranker FA "tốt hơn" rồi cắm thẳng vào BA-core (EW5/bank/redflag đều fail full-NAV).
- Đừng cắm moat overlay hay rating live vào *backtester* (post-hoc, look-ahead — chỉ dùng LIVE).
- Đừng tin signal-level IC: luật của codebase là **luôn integrated-test trên prod-spec NAV**.

---

**Tóm một câu:** 8L không dạy ta "chấm điểm công ty giỏi hơn để book lời hơn" (điều đó đã chứng minh là vô ích cho momentum book) — nó cho ta (A) sửa *đúng* cái gate ngành-aware + bug đòn bẩy/window, và (B/C) một cách dùng FA *đúng chỗ*: như một sleeve uncorrelated / distress-gate / bear-sizing, nơi edge của FA (long-horizon, bear) thực sự tồn tại.

Bạn muốn tôi chạy luôn **(B) distress-exclusion** và **(C) regime-conditional sizing** trên prod-spec không? Hôm nay 05/06 đã sát ngày TODO bạn nhờ nhắc — tôi có thể bắt đầu ngay, hoặc ưu tiên prod-spec validation cho cái sleeve ở Nhóm B (cái có upside Calmar/Sharpe rõ nhất).

content: chạy luôn (B) distress-exclusion và (C) regime-conditional sizing trên prod-spec

content.text: Trước khi code, tôi cần xem hạ tầng hiện có: backtester prod-spec, dữ liệu rating 8L, và cách các test FA-integration trước đây được wire. Để tôi khảo sát song song.

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""rating_8l.py — 8L Quality Rating 1-5 (credit-agency-style), sector-aware.
3	
4	One axis = business durability / permanent-capital-impairment risk (NOT a buy signal).
5	  1 AAA/AA · 2 A · 3 BBB (lowest investment grade) | 4 BB · 5 B/CCC (speculative).
6	Router: BANK(ICB8355) / POWER(ICB7535) / CYCLICAL(commodity map+sugar) / COMPOUNDER(rest).
7	Through-the-cycle (uses _Min5Y floors), sticky, hard red-flag gate. Spec: rating_8l_criteria.md.
8	Validated (a): bins monotonic on fwd-12M return + downside; 3/4 boundary = dip-opportunity vs trap.
9	
10	Exports data/rating_8l.csv (review-only; not yet wired into the pipeline).
11	Usage: python rating_8l.py
12	"""
13	import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
14	import os, sys, subprocess, tempfile
15	try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
16	except Exception: pass
17	from io import StringIO
18	import numpy as np, pandas as pd
19	
20	WORKDIR = os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
21	PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
22	BQ_BIN  = os.environ.get("BQ_BIN", (r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd" if os.name=="nt" else "bq"))
23	
24	COMMODITY_MAP = {
25	 "DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
26	 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore",
27	 "DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
28	 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
29	SUGAR_SET = {"SLS","SBT","LSS","KTS","QNS"}
30	
31	def bq(sql):
32	    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
33	        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
34	    try:
35	        r = subprocess.run(f'{"type" if os.name=="nt" else "cat"} "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false '
36	                           f'--project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000',
37	                           capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300, shell=True)
38	    finally:
39	        try: os.unlink(tmp)
40	        except Exception: pass
41	    if not r.stdout.strip(): raise RuntimeError("bq no rows. stderr:\n"+r.stderr[-1500:])
42	    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))
43	
44	MAIN_SQL = """
45	WITH L AS (SELECT MAX(time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m)
46	SELECT t.ticker, t.ICB_Code,
47	  t.ROIC3Y, t.ROIC_Min3Y, t.ROE_Min3Y, t.ROIC_Trailing, t.ROIC5Y, t.ROIC_Min5Y, t.ROE_Min5Y, t.ROE5Y, t.Debt_Eq_P0, t.FSCORE,
48	  t.CF_OA_P0, t.CF_OA_P1, t.CF_OA_P2, t.CF_OA_P3,
49	  t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P2, t.NP_P3,
50	  t.PB, t.PE, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y, NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0)),2) AS pb_z,
51	  ROUND(t.Trading_Value_1M_P50/1e9,2) AS liq_bn,
52	  ROUND((SAFE_DIVIDE(t.Close,t.HI_3M_T1)-1)*100,1) AS drop_pct
53	FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t, L
54	WHERE t.time = L.mx
55	"""
56	# GPM_P0 + ROE_Trailing + REAL leverage (STLTDebt_Eq = interest-bearing debt/equity, NOT total-liab)
57	# + UnearnRev (người mua trả tiền trước / deferred revenue = RE forward-recognition pipeline)
58	FIN_SQL = """
59	SELECT ticker, GPM_P0,GPM_P1,GPM_P2,GPM_P3,GPM_P4,GPM_P5,GPM_P6,GPM_P7,
60	       ROE_Trailing, ROE3Y, STLTDebt_Eq_P0, UnearnRev_P0, totalAsset_P0,
61	       (SELECT COUNTIF(n<0) FROM UNNEST([NP_P0,NP_P1,NP_P2,NP_P3,NP_P4,NP_P5,NP_P6,NP_P7]) n) AS neg_q
62	FROM (
63	  SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
64	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS t)
65	WHERE rn = 1
66	"""
67	
68	INSURANCE_ICB  = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8530 <= c <= 8579   # 853x nonlife + 857x life insurance
69	SECURITIES_ICB = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8770 <= c <= 8779   # 877x brokers / investment services
70	# diversified holdings classified ICB 7535 but NOT pure power producers -> route as COMPOUNDER
71	HOLDING_OVERRIDE = {"REE"}  # office leasing + M&E + water + power investments (user-confirmed multi-sector)
72	# ICB-mislabeled real-estate (pivoted businesses still tagged by old ICB) -> route as REALESTATE
73	REALESTATE_OVERRIDE = {"HHS"}  # Hoàng Huy: ICB 3353 (trucks, stale) but now a property/holding play (sister of TCH)
74	
75	# ---------- scorecards ----------
76	def real_lev(r):
77	    """Interest-bearing debt/equity (STLTDebt_Eq). Debt_Eq_P0 is TOTAL-liabilities/equity — it counts
78	    customer advances (người mua trả tiền trước) + payables + deferred rev as 'debt', wildly overstating
79	    leverage for real-estate/industrial-park (NTC 3.82 total-liab vs 0.03 real-debt). Fall back if null."""
80	    v = r.get("STLTDebt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
81	    return v if pd.notna(v) else r.get("Debt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
82	
83	def moat_tag(r, roe5y):
84	    """Moat = durable pricing power. Built from GPM LEVEL + GPM STABILITY (stable high margins across
85	    8 quarters = pricing power that competitors can't erode) + ROE level. GPM/ROE are fractions in BQ.
86	    User-prioritized signal for long-term holds -> upgrades rating (see rate_row)."""
87	    gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]
88	    gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
89	    if not gpms: return "WEAK"
90	    gmean = float(np.mean(gpms))
91	    cv = (float(np.std(gpms))/gmean) if gmean > 0 else 9.0          # coefficient of variation
92	    hi_level  = gmean >= 0.25                                       # high gross margin
93	    stable    = (len(gpms) >= 4 and cv <= 0.20)                    # margins don't swing = pricing power
94	    hi_roe    = pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y >= 0.15
95	    if gmean < 0.15 or (pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y < 0.10): return "WEAK"
96	    # STRONG = high stable margin + decent returns (durable moat); else MODERATE
97	    if hi_level and stable and hi_roe: return "STRONG"
98	    if (hi_level and (stable or hi_roe)) or (stable and hi_roe): return "MODERATE+"
99	    return "MODERATE"
100	
101	def core_score(r):
102	    """6-axis validated scorecard (max 12). Returns (score, cfo_np)."""
103	    ttm_cfo = sum(r.get("CF_OA_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
104	    ttm_np  = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i,    np.nan) for i in range(4))
105	    cfo_np  = (ttm_cfo/ttm_np) if (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np != 0) else np.nan
106	    # 3Y windows (not 5Y): hard 5Y-min junked COVID-hit monopolies (ACV/SAS ROIC_min5Y<0 but 3Y +13%/+11%).
107	    # 3Y is responsive and excludes stale one-off shocks (user directive [REDACTED]02).
108	    roic, roicm, roe_tr, de, fs = r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"]
109	    s  = (2 if roic>=0.15 else 1 if roic>=0.10 else 0) if pd.notna(roic) else 0       # avg ROIC quality (3Y)
110	    s += (2 if roicm>=0.10 else 1 if roicm>=0.05 else 0) if pd.notna(roicm) else 0    # ROIC floor (3Y, durability)
111	    s += (2 if roe_tr>=0.18 else 1 if roe_tr>=0.12 else 0) if pd.notna(roe_tr) else 0 # CURRENT profitability (ROE_Trailing, not stale _Min5Y)
112	    s += (2 if de<=0.3 else 1 if de<=1.0 else 0) if pd.notna(de) else 0
113	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=1.0 and ttm_cfo>0) else 1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.7) else 0)
114	    s += (2 if fs>=8 else 1 if fs>=6 else 0) if pd.notna(fs) else 0
115	    return s, (round(cfo_np,2) if pd.notna(cfo_np) else np.nan), ttm_np
116	
117	def stability(r):
118	    """0.4..1.0 — how STABLE profitability is (the real moat). Penalizes (a) volatile gross margin and
119	    (b) cyclical-peak earnings (trailing ROE >> 3Y avg = unsustainable peak, e.g. brokers in a bull mkt).
120	    User [REDACTED]02: stability matters more than a high current number (VIX/CTS high ROE ≠ moat)."""
121	    s = 1.0
122	    if r.get("route") not in ("BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"):   # GPM meaningless for financials
123	        gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]; gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
124	        if len(gpms) >= 4:
125	            m = float(np.mean(gpms))
126	            if m > 0:
127	                cv = float(np.std(gpms))/m
128	                s = min(s, 1.0 if cv<=0.20 else 0.8 if cv<=0.40 else 0.55)   # margin volatility
129	    rt, r3 = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
130	    if pd.notna(rt) and pd.notna(r3) and r3 > 0:
131	        ratio = rt/r3
132	        s = min(s, 1.0 if ratio<=1.3 else 0.75 if ratio<=1.8 else 0.5)   # cyclical-peak detection
133	    return round(s, 2)
134	
135	def redflag(r, ttm_np):
136	    # MINIMAL hard red-flags (user [REDACTED]02: "hạn chế red-flag, để scorecard tự làm việc").
137	    # A single weak QUARTER must not junk a name — judge on the ANNUAL/TTM result.
138	    #   - ROIC_Min3Y<0 REMOVED: it's a quarterly-min artifact (PVS NP_TTM +1934bn but ROIC_min −0.016 → was 5).
139	    #     Weak ROIC still costs scorecard points (0), so the rating system handles it without a cliff.
140	    #   - Keep ONLY genuine structural distress: trailing-YEAR actually lost money, or extreme real leverage.
141	    rs = []
142	    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: rs.append("NP_TTM<0")        # full-year loss = genuine
143	    lev = real_lev(r)
144	    if pd.notna(lev) and lev > 3: rs.append("debt/eq>3")             # interest-bearing debt >3x equity
145	    return ",".join(rs)
146	
147	def bin_core(s):   # validated bins (max 12)
148	    return 1 if s>=10 else 2 if s>=7 else 3 if s>=4 else 4 if s>=2 else 5
149	
150	def rate_securities(r):
151	    """ICB 877x brokers/securities. Financial business: ROIC low/meaningless, leverage = margin-funding
152	    borrowings (operational, like a bank's), FSCORE/GPM/cash-conversion N/A. Earnings HIGHLY CYCLICAL
153	    (track market turnover + margin balances) -> cap at 2. Rate on ROE level + consistency."""
154	    roe = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
155	    if pd.isna(roe): roe = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)        # ROE_Trailing often missing for brokers
156	    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
157	    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe
158	    ttm_np = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
159	    if (pd.notna(roe) and roe < 0) or (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0): return 5, "sec: lossmaking"
160	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.13 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.11: return 2, "sec strong ROE"   # cap 2 (cyclical)
161	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.09 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.07: return 3, "sec ok ROE"
162	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.05: return 4, "sec weak ROE"
163	    return 5, "sec poor/trough"
164	
165	def rate_insurance(r):
166	    """ICB 853x/857x. ROIC/GPM/FSCORE/Debt_Eq are ALL meaningless for insurers (capital = investment
167	    portfolio + float; technical reserves are operational liabilities like a bank's deposits, not debt).
168	    Cat-event losses (storms/accidents) spike one period then recover -> rate on ROE LEVEL + CONSISTENCY
169	    (ROE_Trailing current + ROE3Y avg, which smooths a single cat year). User-requested own lens [REDACTED]02."""
170	    roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
171	    if pd.isna(roe_tr): roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Min3Y", np.nan)         # fallback
172	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr < 0: return 5, "ins: currently lossmaking"
173	    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
174	    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe_tr
175	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.15 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.12: return 1, "ins elite ROE"
176	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.11 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.09: return 2, "ins strong ROE"
177	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.07: return 3, "ins ok ROE"
178	    if pd.notna(roe_tr): return 4, "ins weak ROE"
179	    return 4, "ins no-data"
180	
181	def rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np):
182	    """ICB 8633 real-estate / industrial-park (L8 asset-play). The COMPOUNDER red-flags misfire here:
183	    prepaid land-lease revenue is booked as LIABILITY (inflates D/E) and land-bank acquisition years
184	    show NEGATIVE operating cash — neither is distress. So: red-flag only on genuine TTM losses,
185	    grade ROE_Trailing (realized) + ROIC + LENIENT leverage + lumpy-tolerant cash; cap at 2 (cyclical/lumpy)."""
186	    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: return 5, "NP_TTM<0"
187	    roe_tr, roic, de, fs, roicm = r.get("ROE_Trailing",np.nan), r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"], r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan)
188	    unearn, assets = r.get("UnearnRev_P0",np.nan), r.get("totalAsset_P0",np.nan)
189	    pipeline = (unearn/assets) if (pd.notna(unearn) and pd.notna(assets) and assets>0) else np.nan
190	    s  = (2 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.18) else 1 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.10) else 0)
191	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.12) else 1 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.07) else 0)
192	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=0.5) else 1 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=1.5) else 0)   # REAL debt (interest-bearing), not total-liab
193	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.8) else 0)                                 # lumpy -> light weight
194	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(fs) and fs>=6) else 0)
195	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(roicm) and roicm>=0) else 0)                                     # never destroyed capital
196	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(pipeline) and pipeline>=0.15) else 0)                            # người mua trả tiền trước = doanh thu tương lai đã bán
197	    # capped at 2 (lumpy/cyclical earnings); FLOOR 4 — land-bank asset backing limits permanent
198	    # impairment, so a profitable RE name never hits 5 (only genuine TTM losers, handled above)
199	    rating = 2 if s>=6 else 3 if s>=4 else 4
200	    return rating, f"RE asset-play (s{s})"
201	
202	def rate_row(r):
203	    """returns dict with rating + diagnostics."""
204	    route = r["route"]
205	    s, cfo_np, ttm_np = core_score(r)
206	    moat = moat_tag(r, r["ROE5Y"])
207	    rf = redflag(r, ttm_np)
208	    note = ""
209	    if route == "SECURITIES":
210	        rating, note = rate_securities(r)
211	    elif route == "INSURANCE":
212	        rating, note = rate_insurance(r)
213	    elif route == "REALESTATE":
214	        rating, note = rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np)
215	    elif route == "BANK":
216	        rating, note = rate_bank(r)
217	    elif route == "POWER":
218	        rating, note = rate_power(r)
219	    elif route == "CYCLICAL":
220	        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
221	        elif pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r) > 1.5: rating = 5; note = "debt/eq>1.5 trough-fragile"
222	        else:
223	            prelim = bin_core(s)
224	            fortress = (pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r)<=0.2 and pd.notna(r.get("ROIC3Y")) and r["ROIC3Y"]>=0.20)
225	            rating = prelim if prelim>=2 else (1 if fortress else 2)  # cap at 2 unless fortress
226	            note = "cap2" if (prelim<2 and not fortress) else ("fortress" if fortress else "")
227	    else:  # COMPOUNDER
228	        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
229	        else:
230	            prelim = bin_core(s)
231	            # Moat is prioritized for long-term holds -> STRONG upgrades one notch (3->2 and 2->1)
232	            rating = prelim
233	            if moat=="STRONG" and prelim in (2,3):
234	                rating = prelim-1; note = "moat↑1"
235	            # No ROE_Min/ROIC_Min hard gate (user): a single weak quarter in 3Y must not cap a name whose
236	            # annual result is fine. The scorecard's ROIC/ROE/cash axes already score weak names low.
237	            # Rating 5 = IMPAIRED (lossmaking / over-leveraged = the red-flag branch). A PROFITABLE company,
238	            # however thin (e.g. CTD: GPM 4%, weak CFO, but NP+ & net-cash), is at worst speculative=4 not 5.
239	            if rating == 5: rating = 4; note = (note+" " if note else "")+"profitable→4"
240	    rf_disp = rf if route in ("COMPOUNDER", "CYCLICAL") else ""  # D/E doesn't apply to bank/power/realestate
241	    return dict(rating=rating, core_score=s, moat=moat, stab=stability(r), cfo_np=cfo_np, note=note, redflag=rf_disp)
242	
243	# bank rating from cached lens v3 (gate + metrics)
244	BANKD = {}
245	def rate_bank(r):
246	    """ROE (franchise strength) is the BASE; asset quality (NPL+coverage) is a DIFFERENTIATOR for the
247	    top grades, NOT a hard kill-switch. Market prizes AQ as a PREMIUM (VCB→1) but a high-NPL bank with
248	    strong ROE+capital is still investable (VPB: NPL 3.6% but ROE 15.5%/CAR 14.3% → 3, not 5).
249	    Only a genuinely weak franchise (low ROE) → 5. (Replaces the old NPL>3%-AVOID cliff, user [REDACTED]02.)"""
250	    b = BANKD.get(r["ticker"])
251	    if not b: return 3, "bank-nodata"
252	    roe, npl, cov = b.get("ROE"), b.get("NPL"), b.get("coverage")
253	    if pd.isna(roe): return 3, "bank-noROE"
254	    if roe < 0.08: return 5, "weak franchise (ROE<8%)"          # only genuine weakness -> 5
255	    pristine = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.012 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=1.5
256	    strong   = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.020 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=0.9
257	    if roe>=0.15 and pristine: return 1, "elite asset-quality"
258	    if roe>=0.14 and strong:   return 2, "strong asset-quality"
259	    if roe>=0.12: return 3, "profitable (AQ-modulated)"         # high-NPL-but-profitable (VPB/HDB) land here
260	    return 4, "modest ROE"
261	
262	POWERD = {}
263	def rate_power(r):
264	    p = POWERD.get(r["ticker"])
265	    if not p: return 3, "power-nodata"
266	    v = str(p["verdict"]).upper(); cfo = p.get("cfo_ttm_bn", np.nan)
267	    if "MATURE" in v: return 2, "MATURE_YIELD"
268	    if "PRE_INFLECTION" in v: return 3, "PRE_INFLECTION buy-zone"
269	    if "STRESS" in v or "AVOID" in str(p.get("action","")).upper():
270	        return (5 if (pd.notna(cfo) and cfo<0) else 4), "DEBT_STRESS"
271	    return 3, "power-other"
272	
273	def main():
274	    df = bq(MAIN_SQL)
275	    try:
276	        fin = bq(FIN_SQL); df = df.merge(fin, on="ticker", how="left")
277	    except Exception as e:
278	        print("financial merge skipped:", e); df["GPM_P0"] = np.nan; df["ROE_Trailing"] = np.nan
279	
280	    # load sector lenses
281	    global BANKD, POWERD
282	    try:
283	        bank = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv"))
284	        BANKD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in bank.iterrows()}
285	        bank_set = set(bank["ticker"])
286	    except Exception as e:
287	        print("bank lens load fail:", e); bank_set = set()
288	    try:
289	        power = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","power_lens.csv"))
290	        POWERD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in power.iterrows()}
291	        power_set = set(power["ticker"]) - bank_set
292	    except Exception as e:
293	        print("power lens load fail:", e); power_set = set()
294	
295	    def route_of(r):
296	        if r["ticker"] in HOLDING_OVERRIDE: return "COMPOUNDER"   # diversified holdings (REE) misfiled as power
297	        if r["ticker"] in REALESTATE_OVERRIDE: return "REALESTATE" # ICB-mislabeled RE (HHS)
298	        if r["ticker"] in bank_set or r["ICB_Code"]==8355: return "BANK"
299	        if INSURANCE_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "INSURANCE"   # 853x/857x: own lens (ROE-based, ROIC meaningless)
300	        if SECURITIES_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "SECURITIES" # 877x brokers: ROE-based, cyclical cap 2
301	        if r["ticker"] in power_set: return "POWER"
302	        if r["ticker"] in COMMODITY_MAP or r["ticker"] in SUGAR_SET: return "CYCLICAL"
303	        if r["ICB_Code"]==8633: return "REALESTATE"   # L8 asset-play: deferred-rev/lumpy-CFO -> own lens
304	        return "COMPOUNDER"
305	    df["route"] = df.apply(route_of, axis=1)
306	
307	    res = df.apply(lambda r: pd.Series(rate_row(r)), axis=1)
308	    out = pd.concat([df, res], axis=1)
309	
310	    cols = ["ticker","route","rating","core_score","stab","moat","note","redflag",
311	            "ROIC3Y","ROIC_Min3Y","ROE_Min3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE3Y","ROIC_Trailing","neg_q","ROE_Min5Y","ROIC_Min5Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","Debt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","GPM_P0",
312	            "PB","pb_z","PE","drop_pct","liq_bn","ICB_Code"]
313	    out = out[cols].sort_values(["route","rating","core_score"], ascending=[True,True,False])
314	    os.makedirs(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data"), exist_ok=True)
315	    path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l.csv")
316	    try:
317	        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
318	    except PermissionError:
319	        path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_NEW.csv")
320	        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
321	        print(f"[!] data/rating_8l.csv is locked (open in Excel?) -> wrote {os.path.basename(path)} instead")
322	
323	    # ---- summary ----
324	    print(f"rated {len(out)} tickers -> data/rating_8l.csv")
325	    print("\ndistribution by route x rating:")
326	    print(pd.crosstab(out["route"], out["rating"]).to_string())
327	    known = ["VNM","FPT","MWG","HPG","QTP","MBB","VCB","ACB","VCS","DGC","REE","PVT","GAS","PNJ","DHC","BMP","NT2","DRI","PHR","SAB","VHC","GVR"]
328	    sub = out[out["ticker"].isin(known)].copy()
329	    sub["k"] = pd.Categorical(sub["ticker"], categories=known, ordered=True)
330	    sub = sub.sort_values("k")
331	    print("\nknown names (review):")
332	    print(sub[["ticker","route","rating","core_score","moat","ROIC3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min3Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","note","redflag"]].to_string(index=False))
333	
334	    # ---- TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3), ranked by rating then a route-aware quality score ----
335	    LIQ_MIN = 3.0   # bn VND/day — needs to be actually tradable to count as "investable"
336	    FIN = {"BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"}
337	    def qual(r):
338	        if r["route"] in FIN:   # financials: scorecard N/A -> quality = ROE (trailing, fallback 3Y)
339	            roe = r["ROE_Trailing"] if pd.notna(r["ROE_Trailing"]) else r["ROE3Y"]
340	            return min(12.0, (roe if pd.notna(roe) else 0)*60)   # ROE 0.20 -> 12 (≈ top core_score)
341	        return r["core_score"]
342	    inv = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN)].copy()
343	    inv["qual"] = inv.apply(qual, axis=1)
344	    # STABILITY is prioritized (user): quality is discounted by how stable/through-cycle it is, so a
345	    # cyclical-peak high-ROE broker (VIX/CTS) ranks BELOW a stable compounder of similar headline quality.
346	    inv["qual_adj"] = (inv["qual"] * inv["stab"]).round(1)
347	    inv["rank_score"] = (3 - inv["rating"])*100 + inv["qual_adj"]   # rating dominates; stability-adj quality breaks ties
348	    top = inv.sort_values(["rank_score","liq_bn"], ascending=False).head(30).reset_index(drop=True)
349	    top.index = top.index + 1
350	    top.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_top30.csv"))
351	    # valuation state per name (axis 2): PB vs its OWN 5Y history (pb_z) + drawdown. For quality names
352	    # "cheap" = pb_z<0 (below own normal), DISLOCATED = pb_z<=-1 (the golden-cell buy zone, ~+59%/96% 12M).
353	    def val_state(r):
354	        z, roemin5 = r["pb_z"], r.get("ROE_Min5Y", np.nan)
355	        if pd.isna(z): return "n/a"
356	        # GUARD (user [REDACTED]02): if the company DESTROYED capital in 5Y (ROE_Min5Y<0), its book value
357	        # is unreliable and its historical PB was distorted (HAG: PB_MA5Y 1.66 from a distressed/eroding
358	        # past) -> a low pb_z is a STATISTICAL ARTIFACT, not real cheapness. Flag, don't treat as buy.
359	        if z <= -0.3 and pd.notna(roemin5) and roemin5 < 0: return "0_PBz-TRAP(capital-destroyer)"
360	        if z <= -1.0: return "1_DISLOCATED"        # cheap vs own history = buy zone (book trustworthy)
361	        if z <= -0.3: return "2_below-avg"
362	        if z <=  0.6: return "3_fair"
363	        return "4_rich"
364	    out["val"] = out.apply(val_state, axis=1)
365	    top = top.merge(out[["ticker","val"]], on="ticker", how="left")
366	    print(f"\n=== TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3, liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — ranked by rating x STABILITY-adj quality ===")
367	    show = top[["ticker","route","rating","qual_adj","moat","ROE_Trailing","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","val"]].copy()
368	    print(show.to_string())
369	
370	    # ---- BUY-NOW: quality (rating<=3) x cheap-vs-own-history (pb_z<=-0.3) x BOOK TRUSTWORTHY x liquid ----
371	    cheap = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN) & (out["pb_z"]<=-0.3)].copy()
372	    trap = cheap[cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0]                       # capital-destroyers -> pb_z is an artifact
373	    buy  = cheap[~(cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0)].copy()             # book trustworthy (no 5Y capital destruction)
374	    buy = buy.sort_values(["rating","pb_z"]).reset_index(drop=True); buy.index = buy.index+1
375	    buy.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_buynow.csv"))
376	    print(f"\n=== BUY-NOW (rating<=3 + pb_z<=-0.3 + ROE_Min5Y>=0 book-trustworthy + liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — {len(buy)} names ===")
377	    if len(buy):
378	        print(buy[["ticker","route","rating","moat","stab","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min5Y","liq_bn","val"]].to_string())
379	    else:
380	        print("none — quality names not dislocated right now (market rich). Wait for the pitch.")
381	    if len(trap):
382	        print(f"\n  [EXCLUDED as PB_z-traps — capital-destroyers (ROE_Min5Y<0), distorted book/PB]: "
383	              + ", ".join(f"{t.ticker}(z{t.pb_z:.1f},ROEmin5 {t.ROE_Min5Y:.0%})" for t in trap.itertuples()))
384	
385	if __name__ == "__main__":
386	    main()
387

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""rating_8l.py — 8L Quality Rating 1-5 (credit-agency-style), sector-aware.

One axis = business durability / permanent-capital-impairment risk (NOT a buy signal).
  1 AAA/AA · 2 A · 3 BBB (lowest investment grade) | 4 BB · 5 B/CCC (speculative).
Router: BANK(ICB8355) / POWER(ICB7535) / CYCLICAL(commodity map+sugar) / COMPOUNDER(rest).
Through-the-cycle (uses _Min5Y floors), sticky, hard red-flag gate. Spec: rating_8l_criteria.md.
Validated (a): bins monotonic on fwd-12M return + downside; 3/4 boundary = dip-opportunity vs trap.

Exports data/rating_8l.csv (review-only; not yet wired into the pipeline).
Usage: python rating_8l.py
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, subprocess, tempfile
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR = os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN  = os.environ.get("BQ_BIN", (r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd" if os.name=="nt" else "bq"))

COMMODITY_MAP = {
 "DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore",
 "DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}
SUGAR_SET = {"SLS","SBT","LSS","KTS","QNS"}

def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
    try:
        r = subprocess.run(f'{"type" if os.name=="nt" else "cat"} "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false '
                           f'--project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000',
                           capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300, shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except Exception: pass
    if not r.stdout.strip(): raise RuntimeError("bq no rows. stderr:\n"+r.stderr[-1500:])
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

MAIN_SQL = """
WITH L AS (SELECT MAX(time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m)
SELECT t.ticker, t.ICB_Code,
  t.ROIC3Y, t.ROIC_Min3Y, t.ROE_Min3Y, t.ROIC_Trailing, t.ROIC5Y, t.ROIC_Min5Y, t.ROE_Min5Y, t.ROE5Y, t.Debt_Eq_P0, t.FSCORE,
  t.CF_OA_P0, t.CF_OA_P1, t.CF_OA_P2, t.CF_OA_P3,
  t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P2, t.NP_P3,
  t.PB, t.PE, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y, NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0)),2) AS pb_z,
  ROUND(t.Trading_Value_1M_P50/1e9,2) AS liq_bn,
  ROUND((SAFE_DIVIDE(t.Close,t.HI_3M_T1)-1)*100,1) AS drop_pct
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t, L
WHERE t.time = L.mx
"""
# GPM_P0 + ROE_Trailing + REAL leverage (STLTDebt_Eq = interest-bearing debt/equity, NOT total-liab)
# + UnearnRev (người mua trả tiền trước / deferred revenue = RE forward-recognition pipeline)
FIN_SQL = """
SELECT ticker, GPM_P0,GPM_P1,GPM_P2,GPM_P3,GPM_P4,GPM_P5,GPM_P6,GPM_P7,
       ROE_Trailing, ROE3Y, STLTDebt_Eq_P0, UnearnRev_P0, totalAsset_P0,
       (SELECT COUNTIF(n<0) FROM UNNEST([NP_P0,NP_P1,NP_P2,NP_P3,NP_P4,NP_P5,NP_P6,NP_P7]) n) AS neg_q
FROM (
  SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS t)
WHERE rn = 1
"""

INSURANCE_ICB  = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8530 <= c <= 8579   # 853x nonlife + 857x life insurance
SECURITIES_ICB = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8770 <= c <= 8779   # 877x brokers / investment services
# diversified holdings classified ICB 7535 but NOT pure power producers -> route as COMPOUNDER
HOLDING_OVERRIDE = {"REE"}  # office leasing + M&E + water + power investments (user-confirmed multi-sector)
# ICB-mislabeled real-estate (pivoted businesses still tagged by old ICB) -> route as REALESTATE
REALESTATE_OVERRIDE = {"HHS"}  # Hoàng Huy: ICB 3353 (trucks, stale) but now a property/holding play (sister of TCH)

# ---------- scorecards ----------
def real_lev(r):
    """Interest-bearing debt/equity (STLTDebt_Eq). Debt_Eq_P0 is TOTAL-liabilities/equity — it counts
    customer advances (người mua trả tiền trước) + payables + deferred rev as 'debt', wildly overstating
    leverage for real-estate/industrial-park (NTC 3.82 total-liab vs 0.03 real-debt). Fall back if null."""
    v = r.get("STLTDebt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
    return v if pd.notna(v) else r.get("Debt_Eq_P0", np.nan)

def moat_tag(r, roe5y):
    """Moat = durable pricing power. Built from GPM LEVEL + GPM STABILITY (stable high margins across
    8 quarters = pricing power that competitors can't erode) + ROE level. GPM/ROE are fractions in BQ.
    User-prioritized signal for long-term holds -> upgrades rating (see rate_row)."""
    gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]
    gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
    if not gpms: return "WEAK"
    gmean = float(np.mean(gpms))
    cv = (float(np.std(gpms))/gmean) if gmean > 0 else 9.0          # coefficient of variation
    hi_level  = gmean >= 0.25                                       # high gross margin
    stable    = (len(gpms) >= 4 and cv <= 0.20)                    # margins don't swing = pricing power
    hi_roe    = pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y >= 0.15
    if gmean < 0.15 or (pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y < 0.10): return "WEAK"
    # STRONG = high stable margin + decent returns (durable moat); else MODERATE
    if hi_level and stable and hi_roe: return "STRONG"
    if (hi_level and (stable or hi_roe)) or (stable and hi_roe): return "MODERATE+"
    return "MODERATE"

def core_score(r):
    """6-axis validated scorecard (max 12). Returns (score, cfo_np)."""
    ttm_cfo = sum(r.get("CF_OA_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
    ttm_np  = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i,    np.nan) for i in range(4))
    cfo_np  = (ttm_cfo/ttm_np) if (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np != 0) else np.nan
    # 3Y windows (not 5Y): hard 5Y-min junked COVID-hit monopolies (ACV/SAS ROIC_min5Y<0 but 3Y +13%/+11%).
    # 3Y is responsive and excludes stale one-off shocks (user directive [REDACTED]02).
    roic, roicm, roe_tr, de, fs = r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"]
    s  = (2 if roic>=0.15 else 1 if roic>=0.10 else 0) if pd.notna(roic) else 0       # avg ROIC quality (3Y)
    s += (2 if roicm>=0.10 else 1 if roicm>=0.05 else 0) if pd.notna(roicm) else 0    # ROIC floor (3Y, durability)
    s += (2 if roe_tr>=0.18 else 1 if roe_tr>=0.12 else 0) if pd.notna(roe_tr) else 0 # CURRENT profitability (ROE_Trailing, not stale _Min5Y)
    s += (2 if de<=0.3 else 1 if de<=1.0 else 0) if pd.notna(de) else 0
    s += (2 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=1.0 and ttm_cfo>0) else 1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.7) else 0)
    s += (2 if fs>=8 else 1 if fs>=6 else 0) if pd.notna(fs) else 0
    return s, (round(cfo_np,2) if pd.notna(cfo_np) else np.nan), ttm_np

def stability(r):
    """0.4..1.0 — how STABLE profitability is (the real moat). Penalizes (a) volatile gross margin and
    (b) cyclical-peak earnings (trailing ROE >> 3Y avg = unsustainable peak, e.g. brokers in a bull mkt).
    User [REDACTED]02: stability matters more than a high current number (VIX/CTS high ROE ≠ moat)."""
    s = 1.0
    if r.get("route") not in ("BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"):   # GPM meaningless for financials
        gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]; gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
        if len(gpms) >= 4:
            m = float(np.mean(gpms))
            if m > 0:
                cv = float(np.std(gpms))/m
                s = min(s, 1.0 if cv<=0.20 else 0.8 if cv<=0.40 else 0.55)   # margin volatility
    rt, r3 = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
    if pd.notna(rt) and pd.notna(r3) and r3 > 0:
        ratio = rt/r3
        s = min(s, 1.0 if ratio<=1.3 else 0.75 if ratio<=1.8 else 0.5)   # cyclical-peak detection
    return round(s, 2)

def redflag(r, ttm_np):
    # MINIMAL hard red-flags (user [REDACTED]02: "hạn chế red-flag, để scorecard tự làm việc").
    # A single weak QUARTER must not junk a name — judge on the ANNUAL/TTM result.
    #   - ROIC_Min3Y<0 REMOVED: it's a quarterly-min artifact (PVS NP_TTM +1934bn but ROIC_min −0.016 → was 5).
    #     Weak ROIC still costs scorecard points (0), so the rating system handles it without a cliff.
    #   - Keep ONLY genuine structural distress: trailing-YEAR actually lost money, or extreme real leverage.
    rs = []
    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: rs.append("NP_TTM<0")        # full-year loss = genuine
    lev = real_lev(r)
    if pd.notna(lev) and lev > 3: rs.append("debt/eq>3")             # interest-bearing debt >3x equity
    return ",".join(rs)

def bin_core(s):   # validated bins (max 12)
    return 1 if s>=10 else 2 if s>=7 else 3 if s>=4 else 4 if s>=2 else 5

def rate_securities(r):
    """ICB 877x brokers/securities. Financial business: ROIC low/meaningless, leverage = margin-funding
    borrowings (operational, like a bank's), FSCORE/GPM/cash-conversion N/A. Earnings HIGHLY CYCLICAL
    (track market turnover + margin balances) -> cap at 2. Rate on ROE level + consistency."""
    roe = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(roe): roe = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)        # ROE_Trailing often missing for brokers
    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe
    ttm_np = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
    if (pd.notna(roe) and roe < 0) or (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0): return 5, "sec: lossmaking"
    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.13 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.11: return 2, "sec strong ROE"   # cap 2 (cyclical)
    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.09 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.07: return 3, "sec ok ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.05: return 4, "sec weak ROE"
    return 5, "sec poor/trough"

def rate_insurance(r):
    """ICB 853x/857x. ROIC/GPM/FSCORE/Debt_Eq are ALL meaningless for insurers (capital = investment
    portfolio + float; technical reserves are operational liabilities like a bank's deposits, not debt).
    Cat-event losses (storms/accidents) spike one period then recover -> rate on ROE LEVEL + CONSISTENCY
    (ROE_Trailing current + ROE3Y avg, which smooths a single cat year). User-requested own lens [REDACTED]02."""
    roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(roe_tr): roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Min3Y", np.nan)         # fallback
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr < 0: return 5, "ins: currently lossmaking"
    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe_tr
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.15 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.12: return 1, "ins elite ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.11 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.09: return 2, "ins strong ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.07: return 3, "ins ok ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe_tr): return 4, "ins weak ROE"
    return 4, "ins no-data"

def rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np):
    """ICB 8633 real-estate / industrial-park (L8 asset-play). The COMPOUNDER red-flags misfire here:
    prepaid land-lease revenue is booked as LIABILITY (inflates D/E) and land-bank acquisition years
    show NEGATIVE operating cash — neither is distress. So: red-flag only on genuine TTM losses,
    grade ROE_Trailing (realized) + ROIC + LENIENT leverage + lumpy-tolerant cash; cap at 2 (cyclical/lumpy)."""
    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: return 5, "NP_TTM<0"
    roe_tr, roic, de, fs, roicm = r.get("ROE_Trailing",np.nan), r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"], r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan)
    unearn, assets = r.get("UnearnRev_P0",np.nan), r.get("totalAsset_P0",np.nan)
    pipeline = (unearn/assets) if (pd.notna(unearn) and pd.notna(assets) and assets>0) else np.nan
    s  = (2 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.18) else 1 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.10) else 0)
    s += (2 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.12) else 1 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.07) else 0)
    s += (2 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=0.5) else 1 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=1.5) else 0)   # REAL debt (interest-bearing), not total-liab
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.8) else 0)                                 # lumpy -> light weight
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(fs) and fs>=6) else 0)
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(roicm) and roicm>=0) else 0)                                     # never destroyed capital
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(pipeline) and pipeline>=0.15) else 0)                            # người mua trả tiền trước = doanh thu tương lai đã bán
    # capped at 2 (lumpy/cyclical earnings); FLOOR 4 — land-bank asset backing limits permanent
    # impairment, so a profitable RE name never hits 5 (only genuine TTM losers, handled above)
    rating = 2 if s>=6 else 3 if s>=4 else 4
    return rating, f"RE asset-play (s{s})"

def rate_row(r):
    """returns dict with rating + diagnostics."""
    route = r["route"]
    s, cfo_np, ttm_np = core_score(r)
    moat = moat_tag(r, r["ROE5Y"])
    rf = redflag(r, ttm_np)
    note = ""
    if route == "SECURITIES":
        rating, note = rate_securities(r)
    elif route == "INSURANCE":
        rating, note = rate_insurance(r)
    elif route == "REALESTATE":
        rating, note = rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np)
    elif route == "BANK":
        rating, note = rate_bank(r)
    elif route == "POWER":
        rating, note = rate_power(r)
    elif route == "CYCLICAL":
        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
        elif pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r) > 1.5: rating = 5; note = "debt/eq>1.5 trough-fragile"
        else:
            prelim = bin_core(s)
            fortress = (pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r)<=0.2 and pd.notna(r.get("ROIC3Y")) and r["ROIC3Y"]>=0.20)
            rating = prelim if prelim>=2 else (1 if fortress else 2)  # cap at 2 unless fortress
            note = "cap2" if (prelim<2 and not fortress) else ("fortress" if fortress else "")
    else:  # COMPOUNDER
        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
        else:
            prelim = bin_core(s)
            # Moat is prioritized for long-term holds -> STRONG upgrades one notch (3->2 and 2->1)
            rating = prelim
            if moat=="STRONG" and prelim in (2,3):
                rating = prelim-1; note = "moat↑1"
            # No ROE_Min/ROIC_Min hard gate (user): a single weak quarter in 3Y must not cap a name whose
            # annual result is fine. The scorecard's ROIC/ROE/cash axes already score weak names low.
            # Rating 5 = IMPAIRED (lossmaking / over-leveraged = the red-flag branch). A PROFITABLE company,
            # however thin (e.g. CTD: GPM 4%, weak CFO, but NP+ & net-cash), is at worst speculative=4 not 5.
            if rating == 5: rating = 4; note = (note+" " if note else "")+"profitable→4"
    rf_disp = rf if route in ("COMPOUNDER", "CYCLICAL") else ""  # D/E doesn't apply to bank/power/realestate
    return dict(rating=rating, core_score=s, moat=moat, stab=stability(r), cfo_np=cfo_np, note=note, redflag=rf_disp)

# bank rating from cached lens v3 (gate + metrics)
BANKD = {}
def rate_bank(r):
    """ROE (franchise strength) is the BASE; asset quality (NPL+coverage) is a DIFFERENTIATOR for the
    top grades, NOT a hard kill-switch. Market prizes AQ as a PREMIUM (VCB→1) but a high-NPL bank with
    strong ROE+capital is still investable (VPB: NPL 3.6% but ROE 15.5%/CAR 14.3% → 3, not 5).
    Only a genuinely weak franchise (low ROE) → 5. (Replaces the old NPL>3%-AVOID cliff, user [REDACTED]02.)"""
    b = BANKD.get(r["ticker"])
    if not b: return 3, "bank-nodata"
    roe, npl, cov = b.get("ROE"), b.get("NPL"), b.get("coverage")
    if pd.isna(roe): return 3, "bank-noROE"
    if roe < 0.08: return 5, "weak franchise (ROE<8%)"          # only genuine weakness -> 5
    pristine = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.012 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=1.5
    strong   = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.020 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=0.9
    if roe>=0.15 and pristine: return 1, "elite asset-quality"
    if roe>=0.14 and strong:   return 2, "strong asset-quality"
    if roe>=0.12: return 3, "profitable (AQ-modulated)"         # high-NPL-but-profitable (VPB/HDB) land here
    return 4, "modest ROE"

POWERD = {}
def rate_power(r):
    p = POWERD.get(r["ticker"])
    if not p: return 3, "power-nodata"
    v = str(p["verdict"]).upper(); cfo = p.get("cfo_ttm_bn", np.nan)
    if "MATURE" in v: return 2, "MATURE_YIELD"
    if "PRE_INFLECTION" in v: return 3, "PRE_INFLECTION buy-zone"
    if "STRESS" in v or "AVOID" in str(p.get("action","")).upper():
        return (5 if (pd.notna(cfo) and cfo<0) else 4), "DEBT_STRESS"
    return 3, "power-other"

def main():
    df = bq(MAIN_SQL)
    try:
        fin = bq(FIN_SQL); df = df.merge(fin, on="ticker", how="left")
    except Exception as e:
        print("financial merge skipped:", e); df["GPM_P0"] = np.nan; df["ROE_Trailing"] = np.nan

    # load sector lenses
    global BANKD, POWERD
    try:
        bank = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv"))
        BANKD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in bank.iterrows()}
        bank_set = set(bank["ticker"])
    except Exception as e:
        print("bank lens load fail:", e); bank_set = set()
    try:
        power = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","power_lens.csv"))
        POWERD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in power.iterrows()}
        power_set = set(power["ticker"]) - bank_set
    except Exception as e:
        print("power lens load fail:", e); power_set = set()

    def route_of(r):
        if r["ticker"] in HOLDING_OVERRIDE: return "COMPOUNDER"   # diversified holdings (REE) misfiled as power
        if r["ticker"] in REALESTATE_OVERRIDE: return "REALESTATE" # ICB-mislabeled RE (HHS)
        if r["ticker"] in bank_set or r["ICB_Code"]==8355: return "BANK"
        if INSURANCE_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "INSURANCE"   # 853x/857x: own lens (ROE-based, ROIC meaningless)
        if SECURITIES_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "SECURITIES" # 877x brokers: ROE-based, cyclical cap 2
        if r["ticker"] in power_set: return "POWER"
        if r["ticker"] in COMMODITY_MAP or r["ticker"] in SUGAR_SET: return "CYCLICAL"
        if r["ICB_Code"]==8633: return "REALESTATE"   # L8 asset-play: deferred-rev/lumpy-CFO -> own lens
        return "COMPOUNDER"
    df["route"] = df.apply(route_of, axis=1)

    res = df.apply(lambda r: pd.Series(rate_row(r)), axis=1)
    out = pd.concat([df, res], axis=1)

    cols = ["ticker","route","rating","core_score","stab","moat","note","redflag",
            "ROIC3Y","ROIC_Min3Y","ROE_Min3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE3Y","ROIC_Trailing","neg_q","ROE_Min5Y","ROIC_Min5Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","Debt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","GPM_P0",
            "PB","pb_z","PE","drop_pct","liq_bn","ICB_Code"]
    out = out[cols].sort_values(["route","rating","core_score"], ascending=[True,True,False])
    os.makedirs(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data"), exist_ok=True)
    path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l.csv")
    try:
        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
    except PermissionError:
        path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_NEW.csv")
        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
        print(f"[!] data/rating_8l.csv is locked (open in Excel?) -> wrote {os.path.basename(path)} instead")

    # ---- summary ----
    print(f"rated {len(out)} tickers -> data/rating_8l.csv")
    print("\ndistribution by route x rating:")
    print(pd.crosstab(out["route"], out["rating"]).to_string())
    known = ["VNM","FPT","MWG","HPG","QTP","MBB","VCB","ACB","VCS","DGC","REE","PVT","GAS","PNJ","DHC","BMP","NT2","DRI","PHR","SAB","VHC","GVR"]
    sub = out[out["ticker"].isin(known)].copy()
    sub["k"] = pd.Categorical(sub["ticker"], categories=known, ordered=True)
    sub = sub.sort_values("k")
    print("\nknown names (review):")
    print(sub[["ticker","route","rating","core_score","moat","ROIC3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min3Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","note","redflag"]].to_string(index=False))

    # ---- TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3), ranked by rating then a route-aware quality score ----
    LIQ_MIN = 3.0   # bn VND/day — needs to be actually tradable to count as "investable"
    FIN = {"BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"}
    def qual(r):
        if r["route"] in FIN:   # financials: scorecard N/A -> quality = ROE (trailing, fallback 3Y)
            roe = r["ROE_Trailing"] if pd.notna(r["ROE_Trailing"]) else r["ROE3Y"]
            return min(12.0, (roe if pd.notna(roe) else 0)*60)   # ROE 0.20 -> 12 (≈ top core_score)
        return r["core_score"]
    inv = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN)].copy()
    inv["qual"] = inv.apply(qual, axis=1)
    # STABILITY is prioritized (user): quality is discounted by how stable/through-cycle it is, so a
    # cyclical-peak high-ROE broker (VIX/CTS) ranks BELOW a stable compounder of similar headline quality.
    inv["qual_adj"] = (inv["qual"] * inv["stab"]).round(1)
    inv["rank_score"] = (3 - inv["rating"])*100 + inv["qual_adj"]   # rating dominates; stability-adj quality breaks ties
    top = inv.sort_values(["rank_score","liq_bn"], ascending=False).head(30).reset_index(drop=True)
    top.index = top.index + 1
    top.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_top30.csv"))
    # valuation state per name (axis 2): PB vs its OWN 5Y history (pb_z) + drawdown. For quality names
    # "cheap" = pb_z<0 (below own normal), DISLOCATED = pb_z<=-1 (the golden-cell buy zone, ~+59%/96% 12M).
    def val_state(r):
        z, roemin5 = r["pb_z"], r.get("ROE_Min5Y", np.nan)
        if pd.isna(z): return "n/a"
        # GUARD (user [REDACTED]02): if the company DESTROYED capital in 5Y (ROE_Min5Y<0), its book value
        # is unreliable and its historical PB was distorted (HAG: PB_MA5Y 1.66 from a distressed/eroding
        # past) -> a low pb_z is a STATISTICAL ARTIFACT, not real cheapness. Flag, don't treat as buy.
        if z <= -0.3 and pd.notna(roemin5) and roemin5 < 0: return "0_PBz-TRAP(capital-destroyer)"
        if z <= -1.0: return "1_DISLOCATED"        # cheap vs own history = buy zone (book trustworthy)
        if z <= -0.3: return "2_below-avg"
        if z <=  0.6: return "3_fair"
        return "4_rich"
    out["val"] = out.apply(val_state, axis=1)
    top = top.merge(out[["ticker","val"]], on="ticker", how="left")
    print(f"\n=== TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3, liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — ranked by rating x STABILITY-adj quality ===")
    show = top[["ticker","route","rating","qual_adj","moat","ROE_Trailing","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","val"]].copy()
    print(show.to_string())

    # ---- BUY-NOW: quality (rating<=3) x cheap-vs-own-history (pb_z<=-0.3) x BOOK TRUSTWORTHY x liquid ----
    cheap = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN) & (out["pb_z"]<=-0.3)].copy()
    trap = cheap[cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0]                       # capital-destroyers -> pb_z is an artifact
    buy  = cheap[~(cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0)].copy()             # book trustworthy (no 5Y capital destruction)
    buy = buy.sort_values(["rating","pb_z"]).reset_index(drop=True); buy.index = buy.index+1
    buy.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_buynow.csv"))
    print(f"\n=== BUY-NOW (rating<=3 + pb_z<=-0.3 + ROE_Min5Y>=0 book-trustworthy + liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — {len(buy)} names ===")
    if len(buy):
        print(buy[["ticker","route","rating","moat","stab","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min5Y","liq_bn","val"]].to_string())
    else:
        print("none — quality names not dislocated right now (market rich). Wait for the pitch.")
    if len(trap):
        print(f"\n  [EXCLUDED as PB_z-traps — capital-destroyers (ROE_Min5Y<0), distorted book/PB]: "
              + ", ".join(f"{t.ticker}(z{t.pb_z:.1f},ROEmin5 {t.ROE_Min5Y:.0%})" for t in trap.itertuples()))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
